_note: PROVISIONAL mapping of the EDAS numeric `functional` road-class code to OSM highway=*. EDAS ships no public data dictionary, so this is a best-effort inference from the value distribution (code 2 is ~98% of roads = local/residential; rarer codes = higher hierarchy). The raw codes are ALSO preserved on every way as edas:functional / edas:type / edas:structural for later correction. Unmapped -> highway=road (OSM 'unknown classification'). Refine when the EDAS schema is obtained.
